name: Gnosis VPN
tagline: An experimental, decentralised VPN built on the HOPR incentivised mixnet by Gnosis DAO, with on-chain metered payments. A proof-of-concept, not yet a consumer product.

logging.summary: Decentralised by design: every packet takes an unpredictable multi-hop route through the HOPR mixnet, so no central entity can link traffic. The project notes it is not fully trustless yet.

technical.proprietaryProtocol: HOPR incentivised mixnet (multi-hop, per-packet path mixing with cover traffic) over libp2p; Gnosis Chain as trust anchor and Safe smart accounts for on-chain metered payments

transparency.realWorldNoLog: Decentralised mixnet with no central operator; still an early proof-of-concept and not fully trustless.

bestFor: Web3 and crypto users wanting decentralised, censorship-resistant routing
People who want metadata privacy via an incentivised mixnet, not just IP-hiding
notFor: Everyday consumer VPN use: it's an early proof-of-concept
Anyone needing a finished, audited product today
pros: Built on the HOPR incentivised mixnet: every packet takes an unpredictable multi-hop route
Fully open-source; decentralised and uncensorable by design
Funded by Gnosis DAO governance (GIP-98 / GIP-122); on-chain, no traditional account
Aims for metadata privacy beyond simple IP-hiding
cons: Early proof-of-concept / beta (codenames El Dorado, Atlantis); not production-ready
On-chain crypto-metered payments and desktop / browser-extension only, not for general users
Not fully trustless yet; no independent audit
Different architecture from a commercial VPN, so we list it but don't score it
notes: A decentralised VPN built on the HOPR mixnet, funded by Gnosis DAO (~$1.5M+ to HOPR via GIP-98/122). Routes traffic over an incentivised multi-hop mixnet with on-chain metered payments. Currently an experimental proof-of-concept (desktop / browser extension), with broader early access targeted around Q3 2026. Listed as a decentralised anonymity network rather than scored against conventional VPNs.

sources.label: The Block: GnosisDAO votes $4.8M to fund HOPR's VPN
Blockonomi: GnosisDAO Invests in HOPR to Develop GnosisVPN
